content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — description claims "Built-in ad blocker," "AI-powered suggestions," and "Works fully offline," but ContentView.swift only implements a local in-memory task list with no ad-blocking, ML/AI, or persistence/offline code (App/ContentView.swift:1-22).
Pierre: Apple rejects apps whose marketing claims aren't backed by real functionality, since reviewers test advertised features directly. The description promises an ad blocker, AI-powered predictions, and full offline support, yet the only code present is a simple SwiftUI task list with no networking, ML frameworks, ad-filtering logic, or data storage. Remove these unsupported claims or add the actual implementations before submitting.
